occupation: International Commercial Director at Evolve OOH
summary:
Highly commercial, results orientated and people focused Media professional with significant experience working across all media channels. Key expertise lies in building and developing impactful and retentive relationships with Media Owners, Agencies and Clients, and working in partnership to help all parties achieve more.

Offers a proven success record in managing and leading large teams in order to collaboratively meet business objectives and drive personal growth and development.

experiences.title: Business Manager
experiences.description: Reporting into the Head of Sales and managing a team of 6 (including Group Manager, 2 Account Executives and 3 Assistant Account Executives) with responsibility for maximizing revenue within a portfolio of agencies across spot & VOD trading, broadcast and online sponsorship, product placement, creative spot solutions and multi-platform partnerships across TV, Digital and Print.

recommendations:
Sarah J.

Laura was on MC&C's business at Five. We found her to be an excellent salesperson. Her involvement with us doubled our agency spend yr/yr.She was pro-active,accommodating,really knew her stuff and was always a pleasure to deal with.Can't recommend her highly enough and we wish her all the very best in whatever she decides to do next.
